Video.summary: Have you always wanted to learn how to Sew? Well now's your chance to have a lesson in the comfort of your own home. This easy to follow step by step programme will teach you the basics to get strated and then move on to some simple projects such as making a lined tote bag to practise what you have learnt. You will find out what equipment you'll need, larn some brilliant tips to make beautiful creations including a patchwork cushion and elasticated skirt!
Video.title: Learn to Sew

Image.alt: Learn to Sew
Learn to Sew

Video.summary: Sew along with Beth! Today's block - “Robbing Peter to Pay Paul”.
Video.title: Quilting with Beth: Robbing Peter to Pay Paul Star Quilt

Image.alt: Quilting with Beth: Robbing Peter to Pay Paul Star Quilt
Quilting with Beth: Robbing Peter to Pay Paul Star Quilt

Video.summary: You know we had too!!! LOL!!! With Beyonce's Internet Breaking Historical Coachella performance we've decided to create our very own One of a Kind Custom BEYCHELLA Doll!! Craft along with Froggy as she shows you step by step How to Make your very own Beychella Doll today!
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: DIY How to Make BEYCHELLA Custom Beyonce Doll

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: DIY How to Make BEYCHELLA Custom Beyonce Doll
My Froggy Stuff: DIY How to Make BEYCHELLA Custom Beyonce Doll

Video.summary: We hope you're ready for a EXTREME CRAFT!!! Craft along with Froggy as she makes a Doll Pool 4! A REAL WORKING Pool, Deck and Pool House!

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Doll Pool 4 and Working Pool House Deck

Video.summary: Today at My Froggy Stuff we've got another One of a kind Custom Doll!! This time Froggy creates her favorite YouTuber TraciJHines in this Fabsome One of a Kind Celebrity Custom Doll! From custom Ombre Hair (without rerooting!!) to a DIY Graphic Tee we've checked ALL the boxes!!
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: DIY How to Make TraciJHines - YouTuber Custom Doll - Ombre Hair - Graphic Tee

Video.summary: Tour beautiful artworks and learn about artists throughout history in this special series brought to you by Zhenya Gershman.

Image.alt: Invisible Museum Tours: Rembrandt - The Painter of Light and Dark
Invisible Museum Tours: Rembrandt - The Painter of Light and Dark

Video.summary: Explore the Art of Canvas Painting with nationally acclaimed artist Amit Dutt, winner of the Indian National Academy Award, Bombay Art Society All India Award and many other prestige awards for his unique canvases. Go on a journey with the renowned Indian painter and watch the art happen.
Video.title: Exploring Indian Crafts: The Art of Indian Canvas Painting

Image.alt: Exploring Indian Crafts: The Art of Indian Canvas Painting
Exploring Indian Crafts: The Art of Indian Canvas Painting
